title: send_payment() integration: compose builder + fee + broadcast
description: Wire build_shielded_tx + broadcast_tx into a single send_payment(to: &str, amount_zatoshi: u64, memo_session_id: Uuid) -> Result<TxId> function on WalletHandle. Memo must be populated with session_id UUID per wallet security rules (ZIP-302, design-sqlite-amount-cast memory). This is the top-level function that /pay calls. Defensive programming: (1) check wallet sync status before sending — refuse if last sync > 10 blocks behind chain tip, return Err(SyncRequired) with block lag count; (2) the from-guard pattern: verify session.peer_pub_id matches the payment session before calling (design-from-guard memory); (3) log: 'payment initiated amount=N zatoshi session=<uuid>' — never log the recipient address or key material. Use a subagent to verify the memo encoding is correct per ZIP-302 (UTF-8 memo must be left-padded to 512 bytes with zeros — confirm the convention).
acceptance_criteria: Integration test (no real node): mock wallet with known notes, verify send_payment returns a mocked txid. Test: SyncRequired returned when last_sync is stale. Test: session ID appears in the memo bytes at the correct offset.
close_reason: Done: send_payment() wired into /pay dispatch in commit bfad1cd. Includes sync-lag guard, note selection, tx build+broadcast, memo encoding, MockClient tests, DB recording.
